positive: A highly detailed, mystical botanical arrangement featuring intertwining bioluminescent foliage, crystalline flora, and celestial elements, designed for apparel print. The composition must be perfectly centered, featuring thick, clear silhouettes against a deep indigo and teal gradient background. Use a high-contrast, stylized watercolor illustration aesthetic combined with clean vector graphic edges. Focus on complex leaf patterns, glowing nodes, and geometric cosmic dust scattering. Studio lighting, clean lines, flat graphic style, symmetry, vibrant contrast.
negative: blur, noisy, grainy, text, watermark, signature, logo, abstract shapes, messy, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, photorealistic, 3d render, sketch, out of frame, writing
